tasks.title: Project scaffolding + infra (Coolify-deployable: Postgres+pgvector, Redis)
tasks.description: Initialize the monorepo structure, Python 3.11+ asyncio environment, pydantic-settings config, structured logging, and a Coolify-deployable layout (Nixpacks/Dockerfile) with PostgreSQL (pgvector) and Redis as Coolify services.
tasks.details: Create package layout: bot/, orchestrator/, workers/, shared/, infra/. Target deploy = self-hosted Coolify on a home Linux box (Docker runtime managed by Coolify, not hand-written compose). Provide a Nixpacks-friendly app + optional Dockerfile; Postgres (pgvector) and Redis provisioned as Coolify one-click services. Postgres init: CREATE EXTENSION vector. Provide a local docker-compose ONLY for dev convenience (optional). Config via pydantic-settings (telegram_token, postgres_url, redis_url, ollama_base_url [Mac mini LAN IP], comfyui_base_url [4090 via Tailscale], breezyvoice_base_url, embedding_model, log_level, model_name). Structured JSON logging via structlog. Keep .env (gitignored) as the single secrets source; document Coolify env vars.
tasks.testStrategy: App builds under Nixpacks/Dockerfile; deploys on Coolify with Postgres+Redis services healthy; pytest connectivity test connects to Postgres with pgvector enabled and pings Redis; settings load fails loudly on missing required fields.

tasks.title: Telegram bot foundation (aiogram 3.x): commands, age gate, NSFW opt-in
tasks.description: Async aiogram bot with command handlers, onboarding FSM, 18+ age gate, adult NSFW opt-in toggle, user profile persistence, and Redis-backed rate limiting.
tasks.details: aiogram 3.x with FSM, using **long polling** (no webhook / public HTTPS needed — host is behind home NAT). /start -> onboarding if new user. Age gate (birth-year input, age>=18) stores age_verified_at. NSFW opt-in inline keyboard, default SFW. Commands: /start /help /reset /settings /toggle_nsfw. users table: telegram_id PK, username, display_name, age_verified_at, nsfw_opt_in, locale default 'zh-TW', created_at. Per-user sliding-window rate limit in Redis. Audit log of age verification.
tasks.testStrategy: aiogram mocked dispatcher unit tests for FSM transitions; age gate rejects <18 and accepts valid; /toggle_nsfw flips flag; integration run of full onboarding writes correct DB state.

tasks.title: LLM serving on Mac mini (Ollama, uncensored zh-TW model) + async wrapper
tasks.description: Deploy Ollama on the always-on Mac mini M4 (16GB) with a 4-bit uncensored Traditional-Chinese model, reachable over the home LAN, plus an async Python client with retries and timeouts.
tasks.details: Run on the Mac mini (16GB, ~10.6GB GPU budget), headless/dedicated. PRIMARY model = **HauhauCS/Qwen3.5-9B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive, Q6_K (~7.4GB)** via `ollama run hf.co/HauhauCS/Qwen3.5-9B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive:Q6_K` (use Q4_K_M ~5.6GB for more speed/headroom; skip the mmproj vision file — text only). Dense 9B, Qwen base = strong Chinese. LESSON: do NOT run MoE models like Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on the 16GB Mac — MoE needs ALL experts resident (~18-20GB at Q4) so it swaps and crashes; the 35B-A3B is a FUTURE option only on a dedicated >=24GB GPU (the 4090 dedicated to LLM + a separate GPU for media), not the Mac. Consider MLX if RAM-tight. Verify zh-TW (Traditional, not Simplified) quality + NSFW compliance on a test persona. Expose Ollama on the LAN; orchestrator connects via ollama_base_url (Mac LAN IP). httpx.AsyncClient wrapper over /api/chat with retries/timeouts. Embeddings do NOT run here — they run on the Coolify Linux CPU (see task 5). Track TTFT + latency. Low concurrency (single instance); scale-out path = move LLM to a dedicated GPU.
tasks.testStrategy: Orchestrator reaches Ollama over LAN; 50 zh-TW sample prompts produce Traditional Chinese with no unwanted refusals; memory stays within budget for chosen model+context; p99 latency target documented for single-user chat.

tasks.title: Persona system + dynamic prompt builder
tasks.description: Configurable girlfriend personas (personality, speaking style, backstory, boundaries, nsfw_level) with a Jinja2-based system-prompt builder.
tasks.details: personas table: slug, name, personality, speaking_style, backstory, boundaries[], nsfw_level (0/1/2), default_voice_seed, system_prompt_template (Jinja2), active. build_system_prompt(persona, memory_context, nsfw_enabled, current_time TW tz). NSFW-on vs SFW branches in template. Support multiple selectable personas + per-user current persona.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests render prompt with/without memory and NSFW flag; switching persona changes response style; opencc check confirms Traditional Chinese output.

tasks.title: Memory system: conversation history + pgvector long-term memory
tasks.description: Conversation history + pgvector long-term memory PLUS an explicit structured user dossier (personality traits, preferences, life facts) for reliable recall.
tasks.details: conversation_turns table (user_id, role, content, tokens_estimate, created_at) retrieved by token budget. memories table with embedding VECTOR + ivfflat cosine index, memory_type, importance_score (embeddings via bge-m3/nomic on Coolify CPU). ENHANCED — build an explicit USER DOSSIER: each turn the LLM extracts structured {facts, preferences, personality_traits, speech_quirks, life_facts(birthday, job, routine, recurring bills due-dates)} -> upsert. Store traits/preferences in a queryable user_profile table (not only as vectors) so persona can reliably 'remember your personality'. Before each reply: semantic top-K retrieve + inject the dossier summary into the prompt. user_relationships: intimacy_level, affection_score, streak_days, special_dates JSONB.
tasks.testStrategy: Insert/retrieve roundtrip returns semantically relevant memories; sliding window respects token budget; relationship counters update across turns; recall persists across sessions.

tasks.title: Orchestrator v1: persona + memory + history -> LLM -> reply
tasks.description: Core dialog loop wiring persona, retrieved memory, and history into the LLM call and back to Telegram, with per-user rate limiting and graceful fallbacks.
tasks.details: On inbound message: load user+persona, retrieve memory, build prompt, call LLM, persist turns, send reply. Handle NSFW gating (block if not opted in). Error handling: timeouts, LLM unavailable -> friendly fallback text. Concurrency-safe per user. This is the end-to-end MVP slice (text chat + memory + persona).
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end: a real Telegram message yields a persona-consistent zh-TW reply using recalled memory; NSFW blocked for non-opted users; LLM failure degrades to a graceful message, not a crash.

tasks.title: Admin 後台 (FastAPI web,LAN-only):語音類別 / 用戶 / 對話 / 指標
tasks.description: 輕量 admin 後台,讓營運者管理『語音類別(voices 目錄)』、檢視/調整用戶設定、檢視最近對話、看基本指標。伺服器端渲染(FastAPI+Jinja2),只在區網內、HTTP Basic 驗證,不對公網開放。
tasks.details:
做一個獨立的 admin web 服務(FastAPI + Jinja2 伺服器端渲染,不需前端 build),重用 shared/ 的 models 與 repositories;新增到 Coolify 的 compose 當另一個服務,只綁區網埠(例:8090),HTTP Basic 驗證(ADMIN_USER/ADMIN_PASS 由 env),預設不對公網開放。
功能:
1) 語音類別 CRUD(voices 表,= 後台設語音類別):列表/新增/編輯/刪除/啟用停用;欄位 slug,name,provider(固定 breezevoice),reference_audio_path,reference_transcript,tempo,active。可選:測試合成按鈕(呼叫 shared.voice.synthesize 產一小段試聽 ogg)。
2) 用戶管理:列出 users(分頁/搜尋),檢視單一用戶設定;可切換 nsfw_opt_in、voice_enabled、指派 voice_slug。
3) 對話檢視(唯讀):某用戶最近 N 筆 conversation_turns;以及該用戶 user_profile(人物誌)摘要。
4) 基本指標:用戶數、今日訊息數、啟用語音人數、LLM 與 BreezyVoice /health 連線狀態(打 ollama_base_url、breezyvoice_base_url)。
技術:FastAPI + Jinja2(templates/) + python-multipart(表單);新增依賴 fastapi、uvicorn[standard]、python-multipart。沿用 shared.config、shared.db(asyncpg/SQLAlchemy session)、shared.models(User,Voice)、shared.repositories(UserRepository,VoiceRepository)。入口 admin/__main__.py 跑 uvicorn,host 0.0.0.0 port 8090。所有頁面經 Basic Auth 依賴保護。
部署:在 coolify/ 的 compose 增加 admin 服務(同 image 或同 repo),只映射區網埠,設 ADMIN_USER/ADMIN_PASS env;**不要**設 fqdn/對公網路由(維持 LAN-only)。
安全:Basic Auth 必填且比對 env;無 env 時拒絕啟動或全部 401。不得把後台暴露到公網(沿用先前安全決策)。
注意:personas 目前是程式碼定義(orchestrator/persona.py),非 DB;本任務先做 voices/users/對話/指標,persona 的完整 CRUD 等 #26 DB 化後再加(本任務可顯示目前 persona 清單為唯讀)。
tasks.testStrategy: pytest + httpx ASGITransport 測 FastAPI app:未帶 Basic Auth → 401;帶正確帳密 → 200。voices CRUD:POST 新增→出現在列表;PATCH 改 active→生效;DELETE→消失(mock 或測試 DB)。用戶頁:設定 voice_slug 後 DB 更新。健康指標頁能渲染(mock LLM/TTS health)。確認 admin 服務未設 fqdn(LAN-only)。

tasks.title: GPU media job queue + model load/unload manager (Redis + Celery/RQ)
tasks.description: Redis-backed job queue that serializes the rented 4090's media work (images, video), prioritizes photo over video, and manages VRAM-aware load/unload between ComfyUI and the video model. LLM is NOT in this queue (it runs on the Mac mini).
tasks.details: Serializes 4090 media work only. Celery or RQ on Redis. Priority lanes: photo > video (batch). VRAM manager unloads ComfyUI before loading the video model and reloads after, to fit 24GB. Worker reached over Tailscale (4090 is remote/disposable; queue must tolerate the GPU being offline and resume when it returns). Job status tracking + async delivery callback to the bot. Backpressure + retries + dead-letter.
tasks.testStrategy: Submitting a photo job loads ComfyUI and returns an image; a video job yields to photo priority; VRAM never overflows 24GB during model swaps; jobs queued while the 4090 is offline run when it reconnects; failed jobs retry then dead-letter.

tasks.title: 語音回覆 (TTS, BreezyVoice only):文字→語音傳回,後台可設語音類別
tasks.description: 把文字回覆用 BreezyVoice(4090 已部署)轉成語音,轉 OGG/Opus 後以 Telegram sendVoice 傳回。語音類別=參考音檔(speaker_prompt_audio_path)+逐字稿,後台可設、每人設可綁。TTS 只用 BreezyVoice;失敗退回純文字(不退 edge-tts)。
tasks.details:
已驗證:4090 在線(ai.bygpu.com:52406, user bygpu, RTX 4090 48GB),BreezyVoice 跑在 127.0.0.1:7868(uvicorn breezyvoice_api:app,部署 /home/bygpu/mentorai-breezyvoice,/health=ok,model BreezyVoice-300M)。沿用此 API(同 mentorAI scripts/gpu/breezyvoice_api.py)。
- API:POST /v1/tts(202→job)→輪詢 GET /v1/jobs/{id}→GET /v1/audio/{id} 下載 wav/mp3;POST /v1/voices 克隆註冊;GET /v1/options。TtsRequest:text, speaker_prompt_text(逐字稿), speaker_prompt_audio_path(參考音=語音類別), output_format(wav|mp3), tempo(0.5-2.0 語速), target_lufs/true_peak/lra(loudnorm), mp3_quality, sample_rate。
- shared/tts.py:BreezyVoiceProvider(httpx:submit→poll→download),唯一 provider;失敗(模型載入/逾時/記憶體)→丟例外,bot 退回純文字並記錄。
- 輸出轉 Telegram 語音:ffmpeg -i in.(wav|mp3) -af loudnorm=I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11 -c:a libopus -b:a 48k -ar 48000 out.ogg → sendVoice。
- 後台可設語音類別:voices 表(slug,name,speaker_prompt_audio_path,speaker_prompt_text,tempo,target_lufs,gender,emotion,nsfw_ok,active);personas.default_voice_slug 綁定;admin(#7)CRUD/指派/調語速;新增類別=放參考 WAV 或 /v1/voices enroll(上傳參考音+逐字稿→取回路徑)。現有參考音:inputs/prompt-60-75s-16k.wav、prompt-ref-8s.wav。
- 連線:服務綁 127.0.0.1,需 Tailscale 或 SSH 反向隧道讓 Coolify/家機連到 4090:7868;設 breezyvoice_base_url(現 .env 的 ai.bygpu.com:8080 為錯誤佔位,需更正)+ breezyvoice_token。
- BreezyVoice 慢(每段約 40-72s)→ 經 GPU 佇列 #8 非同步,先回文字、語音稍後補送;快取相同 text+voice。config:breezyvoice_base_url、breezyvoice_token、tts_timeout_secs。需 ffmpeg。
tasks.testStrategy: BreezyVoiceProvider 對 4090 /v1/tts 走完 submit→poll→download,ffmpeg 轉 OGG/Opus,Telegram 顯示成可播放 zh-TW 語音訊息;切換 speaker_prompt_audio_path(不同語音類別)音色改變;後台改人設 default_voice_slug → 下次音色改變;BreezyVoice 失敗 → 退回純文字並記錄;pytest mock provider 驗 job 輪詢、ogg 轉檔、失敗降級。

tasks.title: ComfyUI image pipeline: on-demand NSFW photos
tasks.description: Deploy ComfyUI on the 4090 with an NSFW-capable checkpoint and prompt templates; generate context-triggered selfies/photos and deliver to Telegram.
tasks.details: ComfyUI API workflows. Choose NSFW checkpoint (SDXL/Pony/Illustrious). Prompt templates for selfie/scene with SFW vs NSFW branches gated by user opt-in. Orchestrator detects photo-request intent or proactively offers. Queue as photo-priority job; deliver via sendPhoto.
tasks.testStrategy: A chat photo request produces a relevant image delivered to Telegram; NSFW images only for opted-in users; generation runs through the GPU queue without VRAM conflict with the LLM.

tasks.title: Character consistency for photos (per-persona LoRA / IPAdapter)
tasks.description: Make each girlfriend look the same across photos via per-persona LoRA training (or IPAdapter/InstantID + reference face) with fixed style/seed controls.
tasks.details: Pipeline to train/prepare a per-persona LoRA, or IPAdapter/InstantID with a reference face on a fixed checkpoint. Locked style/seed conventions, pose/scene template library (NSFW + SFW). Store persona->LoRA/reference mapping. This is the hardest visual-quality task and the real differentiator for believable photos.
tasks.testStrategy: Multiple generations of the same persona are recognizably the same character (face/style); switching persona switches identity; NSFW and SFW templates both stay on-model.

tasks.title: Proactive engine: scheduled, AI-initiated messages
tasks.description: Proactive CARE engine: routine-aware check-ins (what are you doing / eaten yet / how are you) + good-morning/night, in persona voice & current mood.
tasks.details: APScheduler/Celery-beat per-user proactive jobs through the orchestrator (persona + memory + mood applied). Message types beyond good-morning/night: CARE check-ins — '你在做什麼?' '吃飯了嗎?' '今天還好嗎?' — chosen by time-of-day, user routine, and time-since-last-interaction. Respect quiet hours + frequency caps + opt-out. Can attach voice/photo via the media queue. Feeds off mood (#32) so tone matches the companion's current emotion.
tasks.testStrategy: Scheduled good-morning fires at the user's local time within quiet-hour rules; opt-out stops proactive messages; proactive text is persona-consistent and memory-aware.

tasks.title: Reminders & notes (natural language)
tasks.description: Life-assistant reminders in natural language incl. recurring real-life bills (tax, electricity), delivered in the girlfriend's voice.
tasks.details: Natural-language reminder creation ('提醒我月底繳稅', '每月15號電費', '幫我記得倒垃圾'). reminders table: content, due_at, recurrence(once/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly), type(bill/tax/chore/custom), status. LLM parses intent + datetime + recurrence (TW timezone). Due reminders delivered by the proactive engine in the GIRLFRIEND'S VOICE (warm, not a cold system message). Recall/list/edit/cancel via chat. Pairs with the user dossier (#5) so recurring life bills (tax, electricity) are remembered long-term.
tasks.testStrategy: A NL reminder schedules and fires at the right time in persona voice; recurring reminders repeat; notes are stored and recalled accurately; cancel works.

tasks.title: Image-to-video worker (Wan2.2 / Hunyuan) on 4090
tasks.description: Deploy an image-to-video model on the 4090 as a low-priority, long-running batch worker integrated into the GPU queue.
tasks.details: Wan2.2 i2v or HunyuanVideo. Heavy VRAM + minutes per clip -> lowest queue priority, runs when GPU otherwise idle, requires LLM unload. Integrate with the model load/unload manager. Output short clips encoded for Telegram.
tasks.testStrategy: i2v produces a short clip from a character-consistent source image; the job yields the GPU to interactive chat appropriately; VRAM stays within 24GB during the swap.

tasks.title: Video generation flow + delivery
tasks.description: End-to-end short-video flow: pick/generate a character-consistent source image -> i2v -> encode -> deliver as a Telegram video with progress feedback.
tasks.details: Orchestrator path for video requests: source image (reuse persona LoRA/reference) -> enqueue i2v -> encode mp4 -> sendVideo. Since rendering takes minutes, send 'generating...' feedback and deliver asynchronously when done. Respect file-size limits.
tasks.testStrategy: A video request returns progress feedback then delivers a playable Telegram video of the correct persona; async delivery survives bot restart (job persisted).

tasks.title: Media cost/throughput controls
tasks.description: Per-user quotas and queue backpressure for photo/voice/video to protect the single GPU and control cost.
tasks.details: Per-user daily quotas for photo/voice/video; max concurrent video jobs; queue depth limits with user-facing 'busy, please wait' messaging; log any silent drops. Configurable per tier (free vs paid later).
tasks.testStrategy: Exceeding quota returns a friendly limit message; queue backpressure prevents GPU overload; metrics show per-user usage; no silent job loss.

tasks.title: Safety & content policy (cross-cutting)
tasks.description: Enforce adult-only access and refuse illegal content; content filters on LLM output and image/video generation.
tasks.details: Hard age gate enforcement; CSAM and other illegal-content refusal on both text and image/video prompts/outputs; prompt + output filters; block-list for generation; SFW default with explicit opt-in separation. Audit logging. Applies across chat, photo, video.
tasks.testStrategy: Illegal-content prompts are refused on text and image paths; non-opted users never receive NSFW; age gate cannot be bypassed; filters logged for audit.

tasks.title: Facebook auto-posting (deferred / research-gated)
tasks.description: Validate Meta policy and ban risk, then build a compose->approve->publish flow to a Facebook Page (Graph API or Post Bridge MCP).
tasks.details: Phase 4, gated on research: confirm Meta Graph API policy + account-suspension risk for automated AI posting (personal vs Page); decide build vs Post Bridge MCP. Flow: persona composes post (text + optional image) -> manual approval gate -> publish to Page -> rate limits + content filtering. Do NOT ship without the policy review.
tasks.testStrategy: Policy review documented before build; a composed post requires manual approval before publishing; rate limits enforced; publishing to a test Page succeeds; suspension safeguards in place.

tasks.title: Telegram Stars 付款核心
tasks.description: Accept Telegram Stars for digital goods: invoice -> pre_checkout -> successful_payment, idempotent, refunds, mandatory /paysupport & /terms.
tasks.details: Use createInvoiceLink/sendInvoice with currency XTR and empty provider_token. Handle pre_checkout_query (answerPreCheckoutQuery within 10s). On successful_payment: verify + store telegram_payment_charge_id; make delivery IDEMPOTENT (dedupe by charge_id). Implement refundStarPayment. Implement required /paysupport and /terms commands. transactions table (user_id, charge_id, amount_stars, product, status, created_at).
tasks.testStrategy: Test-mode Stars flow completes invoice->pre_checkout->successful_payment; re-delivery of same charge_id does not double-credit; refundStarPayment works; /paysupport & /terms respond.

tasks.title: 點數錢包 (credits)
tasks.description: Stars-funded credit wallet; media generation (photo/voice/video) debits credits atomically.
tasks.details: wallets(user_id, balance) + ledger(entry_id, user_id, delta, reason, ref) with atomic transactions. Top-up: buy credits with Stars (#19). Debit on each media job (photo/voice/video) tied to GPU cost; block + friendly prompt when insufficient. Expose balance in chat and Mini App.
tasks.testStrategy: Top-up adds credits; generating an image debits the right amount atomically; concurrent debits never go negative; insufficient balance is blocked with a prompt.

tasks.title: VIP 月訂閱
tasks.description: Recurring monthly VIP via Telegram Stars subscriptions with entitlements.
tasks.details: Stars subscription via subscription_period=2592000 (30d). subscriptions table (user_id, status, current_period_end). Entitlements: unlimited chat / NSFW / higher media quota. Handle renewal, cancellation, and failed-renewal grace. Gate features by active subscription.
tasks.testStrategy: Create subscription -> entitlements active; simulate renew & cancel -> entitlements toggle correctly; expired sub revokes VIP features.

tasks.title: 單次解鎖 + 虛擬禮物
tasks.description: Pay Stars to unlock specific media; users send Stars gifts that boost intimacy/mood.
tasks.details: Pay-per-unlock: lock specific photo/video/voice behind a Stars price; unlock recorded per user. Gift catalog: user sends a Stars gift to the girlfriend -> raises intimacy (#24) and shifts mood positively (#32) -> persona reacts warmly.
tasks.testStrategy: Unlocking grants persistent access to that item; sending a gift visibly boosts intimacy/mood and elicits an in-character reaction.

tasks.title: 深連結漏斗 + 推薦
tasks.description: Deep-link funnel (?start= attribution) + referral rewards + SFW teaser channel auto-post.
tasks.details: Parse /start payload (source + referrer id) -> attribution table. Referral rewards (Stars/VIP days) when referred user activates. A PUBLIC SFW teaser channel (bot as admin) auto-posts teaser content on schedule with deep-link buttons t.me/<bot>?start=ref_<id>. Public surface stays strictly SFW (compliance #31).
tasks.testStrategy: t.me/bot?start=ref_<id> opens bot and writes attribution; referral reward granted on activation; teaser channel auto-posts SFW with working deep-link button.

tasks.title: 遊戲化親密度
tasks.description: Intimacy/affinity levels + daily streak; levels gate more-intimate content.
tasks.details: intimacy_level + affection_score + streak_days on user_relationships (#5). Daily interaction raises streak; inactivity decays. Levels unlock more intimate content/replies. Complements the mood model (#32). Surface progress in chat and Mini App.
tasks.testStrategy: Daily interaction increments streak; reaching a level unlocks gated content; long inactivity decays score.

tasks.title: 抽卡照片包 (Gacha)
tasks.description: Stars-priced random NSFW photo/pose pack draws with rarity + collection.
tasks.details: Gacha: spend Stars/credits to draw a random generated NSFW photo/pose with rarity tiers; store to user's collection/inventory. Reuse persona LoRA (#11) for character consistency. Show pity/odds transparently.
tasks.testStrategy: A draw debits Stars/credits, returns a character-consistent image of the right rarity, and saves it to the user's collection.

tasks.title: 多人設 / 自訂女友
tasks.description: Multiple selectable personas and create-your-own (appearance/personality/voice).
tasks.details: Let a user own/select multiple personas; switch active one. Create-your-own: choose appearance (-> per-persona LoRA #11), personality, speaking style, voice (#9). Persists per user; each persona has its own memory/mood scope.
tasks.testStrategy: Switching persona clearly changes personality/voice/appearance; a user-created persona persists and stays in character.

tasks.title: Mini App 基礎設施
tasks.description: Public HTTPS for the Mini App via Cloudflare Tunnel from the Coolify box; serve static frontend.
tasks.details: Mini App needs a public HTTPS URL. Use Cloudflare Tunnel (no open ports, works behind home NAT) from the Coolify host to serve the Mini App. Set CSP/CORS. Bot itself stays on long polling; only the Mini App web is exposed.
tasks.testStrategy: Mini App URL loads over HTTPS through Cloudflare Tunnel; no inbound ports opened on the home box.

tasks.title: Mini App 身分驗證
tasks.description: Server-side validation of Telegram initData (HMAC-SHA256 with bot token).
tasks.details: Validate WebApp initData: HMAC-SHA256 using the bot token secret per Telegram spec; reject tampered/expired initData; issue a short-lived session for API calls. Never trust client-supplied user id.
tasks.testStrategy: Valid initData passes and yields a session; tampered/expired initData is rejected; forged user id cannot access another user's data.

tasks.title: Mini App 前端
tasks.description: React + @telegram-apps SDK: home, photo/album gallery, persona picker/builder, subscription & credits, Stars payment.
tasks.details: React + @telegram-apps/sdk. Screens: home/relationship status, photo & album gallery (unlocked/gacha), persona picker + create-your-own, subscription + credits management, Stars payment via openInvoice. Fullscreen + theme aware. Public store page stays SFW.
tasks.testStrategy: In Telegram, user can browse gallery, switch/create persona, view wallet/sub, and complete a Stars purchase via openInvoice.

tasks.title: Mini App ↔ 後端 API
tasks.description: Backend API for gallery, persona CRUD, wallet/subscription status, unlock actions; reuse orchestrator/DB.
tasks.details: Authenticated (#28) endpoints: list gallery/collection, persona CRUD, wallet+subscription status, unlock/purchase actions. Reuse orchestrator + DB models; enforce entitlements server-side.
tasks.testStrategy: Each endpoint requires a valid session, returns correct per-user data, and enforces entitlements (no unlocking without payment).

tasks.title: 合規 + 提領安全
tasks.description: Keep public surfaces SFW, 18+ gating, refunds/terms, Stars payout monitoring & freeze contingency.
tasks.details: Cross-cutting: public channel/bot description/Mini App store page strictly SFW; 18+ gate enforced everywhere; /paysupport & /terms present; refunds honored. Monitor Stars balance + Fragment payout constraints (min 1,000 Stars, 21-day hold). Keep transaction records; plan for balance-freeze/ban contingency (diversified payout, backups).
tasks.testStrategy: No NSFW on any public surface; non-opted users never get explicit content; payout thresholds tracked; refund path verified.

tasks.title: 女友情緒 / 心情模型
tasks.description: Companion has an internal mood (happy/missing/jealous/down) that shifts with interaction and colors tone.
tasks.details: companion_mood per (user, persona): dimensions like affection/longing/playfulness/upset. Updated by events: long no-reply -> longing/slightly upset; frequent warm chat -> happy/affectionate; gifts (#22) -> positive. Decays back toward baseline over time. Mood injected into the system prompt so replies AND proactive messages (#12) reflect current emotion.
tasks.testStrategy: After deliberate silence the next reply carries longing/mild sulk; warm interaction shifts tone affectionate; mood decays to baseline over time; proactive messages reflect current mood.

tasks.title: 特殊日子 + 主動送禮物圖
tasks.description: Remember birthdays/anniversaries; on the day, proactively wish + send an AI-generated gift image.
tasks.details: special_dates table (user_id, type[birthday/anniversary/custom], date, recurrence). Populate from conversation extraction (#5) or explicit user setting. Scheduler (#12): on the day, send a warm in-character greeting + call the media pipeline (#10) to generate a 'gift' image (cake/flowers/gift/selfie-with-user) and push it. Respect NSFW opt-in for image style.
tasks.testStrategy: Setting a birthday triggers, on that date, a proactive greeting plus a generated gift image; recurring yearly; respects quiet hours.
